title: arrhenatherum elatius
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius, also known as meadow oat-grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatius include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
